title: Jira Cloud 2-way integration
excerpt:
My two-way integration between Jira and Monday is working great, with the exception of removing the assignee from Monday.  If I remove the assignee in Monday, the removed assignee remains assigned in Jira.

posts.author: Cbass (Christa Bass)
posts.cookedHtml:
My two-way integration between Jira and Monday is working great, with the exception of removing the assignee from Monday. If I remove the assignee in Monday, the removed assignee remains assigned in Jira.
Is there a way to accomplish this?
